title: dendranthema okiense
intro: Dendranthema okiense, also known as Oki chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Dendranthema okiense include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
